transcript: Speaker A: So three years back, we beginned this company. We have went to five cities. Last month we have ran our biggest campaign and it costed us very less. Speaker B: Sorry, you beginned? Speaker A: Yes, we beginned in 2021. Like, sing, sang, ring, rang, so begin, began... No, wait. Beginned... Swapna maza hota, shabda nahi aale. [It was my dream, but the words didn't come.] Yaar seriously, English tenses is a scam. Go-went, buy-bought, aur suddenly help-helped, walk-walked. Uniformity nahi aahe. [There is no uniformity.] Speaker C: Arey tu 100% correct aahes philosophically. Pan investors philosophy nahi aikat. [Hey, you are 100% correct philosophically. But investors don't listen to philosophy.] Speaker A: Mag? [Then?] Speaker C: Are hain bagh, SpeakX. Tujha AI English coach. Jast nahi, fakt 10 te 15 minute daily practice karaycha. Business communication practice aahe, pitch simulations, Q&A. Tenses real conversations madhe naturally fix hotat. [Look at this, SpeakX. Your AI English coach. Not much, just practice 10 to 15 minutes daily. There is business communication practice, pitch simulations, Q&A. Tenses get naturally fixed in real conversations.] Speaker D: Great ideas deserve the right tense. SpeakX. Download now.
on_screen_text: So three years back, we beginned this company, We have went to five cities, Last month we have ran, our biggest campaign, and it costed us very less, Sorry you beginned?, Yes, We beginned in 2021, like.., sing, sang, Ring, rang, So begin, began, No, Wait, Beginned, Swapna maza hota [It was my dream], Shabda nahi aale [Words didn't come], Yaar seriously, English tenses is a scam, Go-went, buy-bought, aur suddenly help-helped, Uniformity nahi aahe [There is no uniformity], Arey tu 100% correct aahes philosophically [You are 100% correct philosophically], Pan investors philosophy nahi aikat [But investors don't listen to philosophy], Mag? [Then?], are hain bagh [look at this], SpeakX, Tujha AI English coach [Your AI English coach], Great Ideas Deserve the right tense, SpeakX DOWNLOAD NOW
summary: An entrepreneur struggles with English tenses during a business pitch, feeling that his dream is hindered by poor grammar. His colleague recommends SpeakX, an AI English coaching app designed for daily practice, business communication, and pitch simulations. The ad concludes with a call to download the app to match great ideas with correct grammar.
